scope.title: Mornye Support v1 Scope
included: Fusion support character identity and party-capable registry module
Baseline and Wide Field Observation modes
Rest Mass Energy and Relative Momentum caps and state ticking
Basic/WFO Basic action resolution skeleton using workbook coefficients
Heavy Geopotential Shift and Heavy Inversion skeleton
Syntony and High Syntony Field duration metadata
Outro Recursion party 25% All DMG Amplification for 30s
excluded: Full Tune Break / Tune Rupture / Tune Strain systems
Proof of Boundedness defensive survival logic
Healing and DEF survival value in DPS

resources.name: Rest Mass Energy
resources.notes: Baseline actions add source-aligned core values where clear.

resources.name: Relative Momentum
resources.notes: WFO actions add source-aligned core values where clear.

resources.name: Concerto Energy
resources.notes: Uses the shared party Concerto system.

resources.name: Resonance Energy
resources.notes: Critical Protocol costs 175 when the shared resource system is active.

modes.notes: Default mode. Basic Attack cycles Stage 1 to Stage 4.
Entered by Geopotential Shift and reviewed Intro Convergence. WFO Basic cycles Stage 1 to Stage 3.

states.notes: Generated by Geopotential Shift. Off-tune buildup, interruption resistance, and healing are metadata only.
Generated by Critical Protocol when Syntony Field is active. DEF and healing effects are metadata only.
Applied by Heavy Inversion. Interfered Marker conversion is not implemented.

actions.baseline_resolution: normal Heavy or Geopotential Shift at 100 Rest Mass
actions.wfo_resolution: Inversion at 100 Relative Momentum; otherwise unavailable

known_limitations: Tune Break is not implemented in Mornye Support v1.
Interfered Marker is not implemented in Mornye Support v1.
Particle Jet response is metadata only.
Mornye Energy Regen scaling for Interfered Marker team damage is not implemented.
Mornye Energy Regen scaling on Critical Protocol crit stats is metadata only.
Proof of Boundedness survival behavior, healing, and DEF effects do not affect DPS in v1.
